semanticOwner: TaxKit repository maintainers through AGENTS.md and docs/README.md
evidence: AGENTS.md says local release checks do not authorize or prove publication and requires named authority, operation, resource, environment, approval boundary, receipt, rollback or revocation, and readback for provider, registry, publication, release, and deployment operations.
docs/README.md says local release checks do not prove npm publication or external consumers.
docs/standards/versioning.md keeps packages private until they are ready for npm publication and describes future publication as conditional.
rejectedAlternatives: Infer npm publication, registry state, external installation, production deployment, or public availability from versioning, changesets, local packing, local checks, docs files, or this decision record.
Add registry, publication, provider, or deployment operations to HGI-207.
Represent a local release:check result as deployment proof.
acceptedOrDefaultBehavior: Publication and deployment remain unavailable and unclaimed in this HGI work until a separately authorized target operation has a named principal, resource and environment, approval boundary, target-owned runbook, receipt, rollback or revocation, and boundary-matched readback. Local repository evidence may state only the local artifact or check it directly observed.

taskBlocking.inheritedNonClaim: Public-doc policy does not establish publication or deployment.
Local proof must retain publication and deployment non-claims until boundary readback exists.
A future runbook needs separate authority and target details before it can operate externally.
Controls may check local evidence but cannot grant external authority or prove external state.

authorityImpact: This decision withholds rather than grants external authority. Any publication or deployment remains a separately approved operation under its named principal and target owner.
nonClaims: No registry, npm, provider, publication, deployment, production, public-site, external-consumer, credential, or approval state is changed or proved.
No release artifact is published or deployed by this documentation decision.
carryingCost: Keep explicit non-claims in downstream docs, proof, runbook, and automation contracts until target readback is available.
reviewOrResumeTrigger: A separately authorized publication or deployment proposal names its target, principal, environment, approval, runbook, receipt, rollback or revocation, and readback contract.
